overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed open world game showing a character in period clothing walking through golden prairie grass toward a wooden house on a hill overlooking a lake and distant snow-capped mountains. The camera smoothly follows the character along a winding dirt path in bright midday sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie grassland with winding dirt path

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily along a dirt path through tall golden grass toward a distant house on a hill

entered.detail: distant mountain range with snow-covered peaks forming the backdrop
two-story wooden house with dark siding situated on a hill overlooking a lake
winding dirt trail cutting through the tall grass field
golden-yellow prairie grass surrounding the path
cluster of buildings in the valley below the mountains

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a winding dirt path through an expansive prairie of golden grass. In the distance, snow-capped mountains rise against a bright blue sky, while a wooden house sits atop a hill to the right overlooking a distant lake. A small town is visible in the valley to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy hillside ascending toward lakeside house

events.description: path begins ascending the hill toward the house, increasing elevation

agents.ego_description: character continues walking uphill along the path, approaching the house on the crest

entered.detail: blue lake water visible beyond the house on the hill
boulder sitting in the grass to the left of the path

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the grassy hill, with the wooden house growing larger and more detailed ahead. The lake becomes visible behind the house, shimmering in the sunlight. The snow-capped mountains shift to the left as the camera rounds the hillside, and a large boulder appears near the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: hilltop clearing with house and campfire

events.description: campfire with cooking pot comes into view near the house

agents.ego_description: character walking toward the house and a smoking campfire, reaching the destination area

entered.detail: active campfire with cooking tripod and pot emitting smoke
simple wooden fence posts near the house
white smoke rising from the house chimney indicating occupancy

segments.scene_description: The character crests the hill and approaches the wooden house, which now dominates the right side of the frame. A smoking campfire with a cooking setup sits near the path, and smoke rises from the house chimney. The lake shifts to the left background as the character reaches the house clearing.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an expansive golden prairie that gradually closes in on a secluded hillside homestead. It begins with the character walking along a winding dirt path, with snow-capped mountains and a distant town framing the wide horizon. As the character ascends the grassy hill, the wooden house grows larger and more detailed while the shimmering lake emerges from behind the structure and the mountains shift toward the left. The scene then narrows as the camera rounds a large boulder and crests the hill, bringing the house into dominant view on the right. Finally, the perspective shifts toward the house clearing, passing a smoking campfire and a cooking setup as smoke rises from the chimney against the backdrop of the lake.
